subject: SIP Weekly Update - Week of 20 Jan
deck_filename: Counter Taobao Weekly Update - Week of 20 Jan.pdf

content.answer:
Hi Ian,

Please find the weekly SIP update for your review (TB updates in
attachment). Key highlights for this week are


   -

   Performance
   -

      Jan proj ADO 152,248, 99% RR; ADO as %CB +0.51pp MoM; proj ADG $1.6M,
      101%RR; ADG as %CB +0.80pp MoM; slightly missing target still as MY
      platform traffic is lower than expected. IDMY proj 90% RR, +7% from
      last week, after the catch-up plan implemented (budget ramp up in ads
      and rebates) since last week
      -

      P&L P+SA breakeven; combined P&L at Shopee level healthy at $91k
      daily, +23% MoM
      -

      Logistics/ops/product performance on track. MYSG seller center target
      go-live 30 Mar. BPM team completed IDMY seller center proposal for ID
      BPM/Biz review by EOW; target go-live 30-Apr
      -

   Key projects
   -

      Taobao fashion: SG+MY MTD ADO 3.5k (+15% MoM); next step to start
      tracking topline and PC2 component for SG/MY/TH/VN/TW from 1 Feb
      -

      Taobao furniture: completed 1st round pitching for listing migration
      with 48 GGPs; 3/48 accepted for SG, and 8/48 accepted for MY.
      However, most sellers (23/48 for SG and 15/48) have no feedback yet. Next
      step to follow-up/repitch post CNY
      -

      Direct selling: In progress of preparing for IDMY pilot to be
      launched by 24-Feb. ID acquisition team to finalize pilot list of ~30
      sellers by EOW. Other prep items on track. Next step to align with
      Putri/Christin to go ahead with the pilot
      -

      BN: successfully launched on 17 Jan. MTD ADO 3.9k. Reactive PR plan
      in place. MY marketing team proposes potential initiatives (Topic #F2)



Performance Dashboard (as of 22 Jan)

A/ Topline/P&L


Highlights

   1.

   [Topline] Jan proj ADO 152,248, 99% RR; ADO as %CB +0.51pp MoM; proj ADG
   $1.6M, 101%RR; ADG as %CB +0.80pp MoM
   1.

      Local SIP proj ADO 99% RR, ADO as % CB +0.51pp MoM

*Local SIP proj ADO 99% RR, ADO as % CB +0.51pp MoM*; slightly
*CNSIP proj ADO 103% RR, ADO as % CB stable MoM;* outperforming
*WH cross-selling proj 71% RR*, mainly due to CB Choice LFF (MYSG)
*Local SIP P+SA MTD daily PC2 breakeven*; rest of Jan focus to ramp
*CNSIP SA MTD daily PC2 breakeven*, expect to land at breakeven for
*Overall combined PC2 healthy at Shopee level at $91k daily, +23% MoM*
*MYSG **proj 117% RR, +5% MoM*, in line with platform MoM growth
*IDMY proj 90% RR,  +7% from last week*, after the catch-up plan
*VNMY* proj 85% RR, -11% MoM due to Tet holiday impact is higher than
*CB MP LFF (MYSG) proj 123%, -3% MoM*; driven by SKU efficiency
*Local SCS cross-selling (MYSG) proj 88%, -3% MoM*; mainly due to

*IDSG: 105% RR, -0.7 days MoM;* mainly driven by further tightening
*MYPH: 93% RR, -0.9 days MoM; *mainly driving by FM LT increase due
*MYTH: 95% RR, +0.4 days MoM; *mainly driving by FM LT increase and
*VNSG: 99% RR, +0.5 days MoM; *mainly driven by the transition of

*#6* *(FBS x SIP): *PRD review with supply chain done on 23 Jan;
*#8 (BRSIP):* BRD reviewed with LATAM product team on 14 Jan, PRD

Plans to seed the idea of BN users can download from BN app stores
Spoken with MY team (Ming Kit and Lim Wei copied in this email), SEM

In progress of seller pitching by ID RM team; *target to confirm ~30
MY seller incentive package (TB fashion package) and marketing
Shop setup and biz ops support resources confirmed with MYSG team
In progress of setting up logistics channel and finalizing shipping

*Overall pilot and scale-up plan*
*SGSIP MTD performance* (SGMY+SGTH)*:* ADO 73 (RR 119%, MoM +8%), ADG
*SIP x ESG launch event confirmed for 7 Feb 10am at 5SPD*
SIP/PR team to revise Kel Jin’s presentation slides to media by 24
PR team to revise press release and briefing book with SIP inputs, to
*PR team to share all finalised versions with Ian for visibility by

*ESG open to co-invest into either/both 1) more SGSIP lanes; 2)

Seller comms: First round to be sent out to managed sellers by 27
Ongoing workstream ownership alignment between Annie and Shuning

*MY FP&A finalized the new P BPSF for MYSIP. Next step for SIP team
MY local Logistics Ops will configure the new P BPSF rate card in
*IDSIP*: kick started discussion with ID FP&A. ID expressed concerns
*VNSIP*: No actions required, as already charged fair P BPSF
*Other P-sites*: to kick-start discussion from Feb after settling top

*7 top sellers have agreed to conduct 10-20% price reduction as of 24

*IDSIP*: kick-start discussion with IDSIP SMT next week; target kick
*Regional discount tool* for mass price reduction
HQ Legal reviewing ToS and seller comms messages for MYSIP. VN team
Raised BPM ticket to improve the tool design to fit for purpose: 1)
Pilot started on 23 Dec with 300 new SKUs and 300 top old SKUs on 2
Status: stage 2 x 10 days completed (1 more stage to go)
*Interim performance: compared with pre-trial period, ADO +9%, Ads
Next steps: 1) conclude pilot by 4 Feb; 2) raise product request for
Progress: 3 stages completed (15 days in total)
*Performance: ADO 59, ads ROI 4.5 (on par with lane average), 25%

content.answer:
Hi Ian,

Slide 5

   -

   Is the PC2 for SG too healthy? Shall we put back to drive for growth?
   -

      TB fashion PC2 at 8.4% is higher than SG platform (6.9% proj), but on
      par with SGCB PC2 (8.5% proj)
      -

      PC2 MoM growth is driven by paid ads - mainly contributed by SIP + a
      few key sellers
      -

      We will align with Kel Jin on potential reinvestment [ETA: 3 Feb]



Slide 6

   -

   Can start tracking PC2 here please
   -

      Ok; we already have the 1st draft of PC2 and its components across
      markets. In progress of aligning the data with local markets. Will start
      reporting from 1 Feb



Slide 13

   -

   When do we expect them to start selling?
   -

      We will start to push for SKU migration/cross-listing in mid-Feb
      after sellers are back from CNY break


Thank you.
Cuiwei

content.question: probably more important we grow TB sellers during the starting period?

and to let buyers know that we have more fashionable sellers on the
platform too?

content.answer:
Hi Ian, happy new year!


probably more important we grow TB sellers during the starting period?

and to let buyers know that we have more fashionable sellers on the
platform too?



   -

   Marketing front, SG team plans to
   -

      Affiliate: Push more TB assortment to our fashion affiliates (incl
      XHS Affiliates)
      -

      Livestream: Daily 8pm live fashion try-on, providing top KOL match to
      sellers in exchange for upsized AMS and exclusive LS deals [ETA 2.15 to
      start daily fashion stream]
      -

      Shopee fashion microsite: feature these assortments more prominently
      -

   From BD side, SG team will supplement support with PRM, paid ads credit
   and seller management


Thank you.
cuiwei

      XHS Affiliates)
      -

      sellers in exchange for upsized AMS and exclusive LS deals [ET
